title: AI Thought Experiment Triggers Stock Market Spiral
summary: An AI thought experiment on Substack is causing market turmoil, reflecting Wall Street's growing anxiety about AI's pervasive influence.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the market's sensitivity to AI-related news and the potential for rapid shifts in investor sentiment.

title: Kalshi's Prediction Market: Gambling or Societal Good?
summary: Kalshi defends its prediction market, arguing that betting on events isn't gambling but beneficial for society.
charlotte_impact: Raises questions about the legality and ethical implications of prediction markets in the news and finance.

title: Trump Family Discusses 'Retribution' at Crypto Event

title: Bitcoin Miner Pivots to AI, Sells $305M in Crypto
summary: A major Bitcoin miner sells $305 million worth of crypto to fund a strategic shift towards artificial intelligence.
